sqlMap.select: select * from indexcol where metaindexno = #metaindexno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into indexcol(metaindexno, metaobjectno, structureno, property indexorder seq ) values (#metaindexno:NUMERIC#, #metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC#, #property# #indexorder# #seq# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('indexcol') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select indexcolno, property, indexorder, seq, metaindexno, metaobjectno, structureno from indexcol where indexcolno = #indexcolno# and metaindexno = #metaindexno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update indexcol set
property = #property# property = null indexorder = #indexorder# indexorder = null seq = #seq# seq = null
where indexcolno = #indexcolno# and metaindexno = #metaindexno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from indexcol where indexcolno = #indexcolno# and metaindexno = #metaindexno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from indexcol where metaindexno = #metaindexno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select indexcolno, property, indexorder, seq, metaindexno, metaobjectno, structureno from indexcol where indexcolno = #indexcolno# and metaindexno = #metaindexno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
select indexcolno, metaindexno, metaobjectno, structureno, property, indexorder, seq from indexcol where metaindexno = #metaindexno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
